raw_consumer_statement: XXXX back to back fraudulent charges made on my card XX/XX/XXXX totaling {$300.00}. The merchant is listed as vital labs. When I initially looked up this company, the website was expired and took me to the domain hosts website. Thinking it was clear cut I couldnt have made these charges since the website wasnt even up that day, I assumed it would be an easy dispute. I log onto my CC portal and see the dispute was denied and I am liable for the charges. No reason stated why on the app. I will be calling to find out more.
